title: eriogonum ovalifolium var. anserinum
intro: Eriogonum ovalifolium var. anserinum, also known as Anserina Buckwheat or Sagebrush Buckwheat, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Eriogonum ovalifolium var. anserinum include its potential to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
